IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: NOVO NORDISK FONDEN (NNF) IS AN ORGANIZATION RECOGNIZED BY THE IRS AS DESCRIBED IN SECTION 501(C)(4) THAT AWARDS GRANTS TO SUPPORT SCIENTIFIC, HUMANITARIAN AND SOCIAL CAUSES. NOVO HOLDINGS A/S (NH) HOLDS AND MANAGES NNF'S ENDOWMENT TO ENSURE THAT NNF HAS THE RESOURCES NECESSARY TO SUPPORT ITS SCIENTIFIC, HUMANITARIAN, AND OTHER SOCIAL WELFARE GRANTMAKING.
IRS990.MissionDesc: NOVO HOLDINGS A/S (NH) HOLDS AND MANAGES NOVO NORDISK FONDEN'S (NNF) ENDOWMENT TO ENSURE THAT NNF HAS THE RESOURCES NECESSARY TO SUPPORT ITS SCIENTIFIC, HUMANITARIAN, AND OTHER SOCIAL WELFARE GRANTMAKING.
IRS990.Desc: NOVO HOLDINGS A/S (NH) MANAGES NNF'S ENDOWMENT WITH THE AIM OF GENERATING ATTRACTIVE LONG-TERM RETURNS IN ORDER TO ENSURE THAT NNF HAS THE RESOURCES NECESSARY TO SUPPORT ITS SCIENTIFIC, HUMANITARIAN, AND OTHER SOCIAL WELFARE GRANTMAKING PROGRAMS, THUS IMPROVING PEOPLE'S HEALTH AND THE SUSTAINABILITY OF SOCIETY AND THE PLANET.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: NOVO HOLDINGS HOLDS AND MAINTAINS ENDOWMENT FUNDS IN ORDER TO FURTHER NOVO NORDISK FONDEN'S GRANTMAKING PROGRAMS RELATED TO MEDICAL RESEARCH, RESEARCH HOSPITAL ACTIVITIES, AND OTHER HUMANITARIAN AND SOCIAL PURPOSES.
NNF SHARES 729,451,345. SLA INCOME -9,797,382. TRANSACTION COSTS -40,639,549.
SLA REVENUE 9,797,382. INTEREST AND OTHER FINANCIAL EXPENSES 101,030,984.

AccountActivitiesOutsideUSGrp.RegionTxt: EAST ASIA AND THE PACIFIC - AUSTRALIA, BRUNEI, BURMA, CAMBODIA,
EUROPE (INCLUDING ICELAND & GREENLAND) - ALBANIA, ANDORRA, AUSTRIA, BELGIUM
MIDDLE EAST AND NORTH AFRICA - ALGERIA, BAHRAIN, DJIBOUTI, EGYPT,
NORTH AMERICA - CANADA AND MEXICO, BUT NOT THE UNITED STATES
SOUTH ASIA - AFGHANISTAN, BANGLADESH, BHUTAN, INDIA, MALDIVES, NEPAL,
CENTRAL AMERICA AND THE CARIBBEAN - ANTIGUA & BARBUDA, ARUBA, BAHAMAS,

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 6
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: NOVO HOLDINGS A/S (NH) ONLY HAS ONE MEMBER, NOVO NORDISK FONDEN (NNF).

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: NNF, AS THE SOLE MEMBER OF NH, HAS SOLE AUTHORITY TO ELECT NH'S BOARD OF DIRECTORS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: NNF, AS THE SOLE MEMBER OF NH, HAS CERTAIN RESERVED POWERS AND AUTHORITIES WITH RESPECT TO NH'S ACTIVITIES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FORM 990 IS PREPARED BY KPMG, NH'S OUTSIDE ACCOUNTING FIRM, AND REVIEWED BY NH'S INTERNAL TAX TEAM. THEN, THE FORM 990 IS APPROVED BY MANAGEMENT AND FILED AS REQUIRED WITH THE IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ANY ACTUAL OR POTENTIAL CONFLICTS OF INTEREST SHALL BE REPORTED TO THE EMPLOYEE'S MANAGER AS WELL AS THEIR P&O PARTNER OR THE NH COMPLIANCE OFFICER IMMEDIATELY UPON DISCOVERY. MANAGERS AND THE NH COMPLIANCE OFFICER ARE TO ENSURE NO EMPLOYEES WITH ACTUAL OR POTENTIAL CONFLICTS OF INTEREST ARE INVOLVED IN ANY RELEVANT DECISION-MAKING PROCESSES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: COMPENSATION REVIEW & APPROVAL PROCESS - DIRECTORS AND OFFICERS IN ESTABLISHING THE COMPENSATION OF THE ORGANIZATION'S DIRECTORS AND OFFICERS, INDEPENDENT COMPENSATION CONSULTANTS ARE UTILIZED, COMPENSATION STUDIES ARE COMPLETED TO GATHER COMPARATIVE DATA, PERSONS WITH A CONFLICT INTEREST REGARDING THE COMPENSATION ARRANGEMENTS AT ISSUE ARE NOT INVOLVED IN THE DECISION MAKING PROCESS, AND AMOUNTS ARE REVIEWED AND APPROVED BY THE COMPENSATION COMMITTEE OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS. IN ADDITION, THERE IS CONTEMPORANEOUS DOCUMENTATION AND RECORD KEEPING FOR DELIBERATIONS AND DECISIONS REGARDING THE COMPENSATION ARRANGEMENTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION'S GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE MADE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC THROUGH THE ORGANIZATION'S WEBSITE AS WELL AS UPON REQUEST.

NOVO HOLDINGS (NH) HAS DISCLOSED THE NAMES AND COMPENSATION OF ALL OF ITS DIRECTORS, OFFICERS, AND EMPLOYEES WITH SUBSTANTIAL INFLUENCE OVER ITS AFFAIRS WITHIN THE MEANING OF SECTION 4958(F)(1)(A). IT CANNOT, HOWEVER, PUBLICLY DISCLOSE THE COMPENSATION OF CERTAIN EMPLOYEES WHO FALL WITHIN THE INSTRUCTIONS' DEFINITIONS OF 'HIGHLY COMPENSATED EMPLOYEES' BECAUSE THIS INFORMATION SHOULD NOT BE PUBLICLY DISCLOSED PURSUANT TO THE DATA PROTECTION REGULATIONS WITHIN THE EUROPEAN UNION. THESE EMPLOYEES DO NOT HAVE SUBSTANTIAL INFLUENCE OR CONTROL OVER NH AND THEIR COMPENSATION IS REASONABLE COMPENSATION NEGOTIATED AT ARM'S LENGTH AND CAN BE PROVIDED TO THE IRS UPON REQUEST.
FX DIFFERENCE -291,972,066. PRIMO BALANCE FX -1,303,315,856. DIVIDEND PAYOUT -767,459,708.
